description: Style NoteStrikingly chic, this top from femella is a casual wardrobe essential. Giving you a well defined silhouette, this top can be paired with jeans and sandal for a smart and chic look. Product DetailsBlack T-shirt , has a round neck, short sleeves and brand logo appliqued above the hemlineMaterial and CareBlended fabricWash with like coloursDo not bleach or wringDry inside outUse warm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8", chest 33") is wearing a size M
